subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who calleth is verily the Ocean of Grace and the Heaven of Justice - He is, in truth, He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینادی انه لبحر الفضل و سماء العدل انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
